title: 5 PCS 7 in(17.78cm) Large Pull Bows Wrapping Pull Bow Ribbon，Blue Gift Wrap Bows for Gift Wrapping Baskets Wedding or Flower Decorations, Valentine's Day Birthday Gift Decorations
features: Gift Wrap Bows Size：The total length of each bow is 65 in(165cm) and the width is 2.5 in(6.35). When assembled into a bow, the diameter is 7 in(17.78cm). Very easy to operate。
Gift Wrap Bows Total quantity：You will receive 5 pieces bows for gift wrapping.
Easy to assemble：just pull the two ribbons at their tails to assemble them， you can also restore it after use and reuse it.
Wide applications:these pull bows can be applied to Christmas gifts, weddings, parties, birthday parties, wrapping boxes, wedding supplies, flower making, home decoration, party decoration.
